name: Soon by Northpeak
title: Coming-soon
summary: A single-screen coming-soon teaser with a live launch countdown, a validating email capture that confirms and remembers you, a waitlist counter, and social links.
setup_questions: What's the product name, one-line promise, and intended audience?
What's the target launch date, and should the page show an exact date or a looser season/month?
Where should signups go, and what consent or privacy note belongs beside the form?
Which contact and social links should appear, if any?
sections: Live launch countdown (days/hours/minutes/seconds) with a 'we're live' end state
Validating email capture with inline errors and a warm success state
Waitlist counter that ticks up once you've joined
based_on: A realistic, evergreen example modeled on a common real-world need: the single-screen 'coming soon' / waitlist teaser every new product ships before launch.
